properties.name: api.security.token.secret
properties.description: A secret key used for signing JWT tokens. It should be a long and secure string to ensure the integrity and security of the tokens. The value can be set through the application properties or environment variable JWT_SECRET.

properties.name: api.default.admin.email
properties.description: A default email address for the admin user. This value can be set through the application properties or environment variable DEFAULT_EMAIL. It is used by the AdminSeeder to create an admin user if one does not already exist in the database.

properties.name: api.default.admin.senha
properties.description: A default password for the admin user. This value can be set through the application properties or environment variable DEFAULT_SENHA. It is used by the AdminSeeder to create an admin user if one does not already exist in the database.
